name: DependabotFetchMetadata
description: Fetch metadata from a Dependabot pull request.
author: Tingle Software

inputs.name: azureDevOpsServiceConnection
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Service Connection to use.
inputs.helpMarkDown: Specify a service connection to use, if you want to use a different service principal than the default.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsAccessToken
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Personal Access Token.
inputs.helpMarkDown: The Personal Access Token for accessing Azure DevOps repositories. Use this in place of azureDevOpsServiceConnection such as when it is not possible to create a service connection.

outputVariables.name: dependencyNames
outputVariables.description: A comma-separated list of all package names updated.

outputVariables.name: updateType
outputVariables.description: The highest semver change being made by this PR, when known.

outputVariables.name: updatedDependenciesJson
outputVariables.description: A JSON string containing information about each updated dependency.

outputVariables.name: directory
outputVariables.description: The directory for the first updated dependency.

outputVariables.name: packageEcosystem
outputVariables.description: The package ecosystem for this updated dependency.

outputVariables.name: previousVersion
outputVariables.description: The previous version for the first updated dependency, when known.

outputVariables.name: newVersion
outputVariables.description: The new version for the first updated dependency.

outputVariables.name: maintainerChanges
outputVariables.description: Whether the pull request body contains Maintainer changes.

outputVariables.name: dependencyGroup
outputVariables.description: The dependency group that the PR is associated with.
